What could be the possible causes of toothache?

Toothache can be caused by several factors, including tooth decay, gum disease, a cracked tooth, an exposed tooth root, or a sinus condition. Other possible causes include a jaw joint disorder, impacted wisdom teeth, or an abscess. Proper dental hygiene and regular check-ups can help prevent many of these issues. If you experience a toothache, it's advisable to consult a dentist to determine the exact cause and receive appropriate treatment.
